name: Valentine's Day Heart Print Table Cover - Spritz™
description:
Set the scene for a sweet celebration with the Valentine's Day Heart Print Table Cover from Spritz™. Featuring a charming heart design with a love-and-romance theme, this table cover adds instant festive flair to your Valentine’s Day decor. Measuring 105 inches long and 52.16 inches wide, it’s sized to fit most tables, perfect for parties, dinners or classroom celebrations. Made from durable material that’s reusable or disposable, it offers flexible use and easy cleanup while helping protect your table. Ideal for creating a heartfelt table setting for any Valentine’s occasion.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
